title: rubus × assurgens var. belliatus
intro: Rubus × assurgens var. belliatus, a rare hybrid of the bramble family, is a thorny shrub native to the British Isles. It has been used in traditional herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its astringent, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties, which can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Rubus × assurgens var. belliatus include its ability to soothe digestive problems, reduce fever, and act as an antiseptic agent for wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
